notes: The maze layout is severely broken (only 26 rows instead of 31, ghost house area is malformed, tunnel row is wrong), pac-man mouth direction math is incorrect (dir*PI/2 offset doesn't match actual directions), ghosts use a naive greedy pathfinding that causes them to get stuck in walls, dotsRemaining is hardcoded to 240 but the actual maze has far fewer dots, and the overall visual appearance barely resembles a proper pac-man game.

Playable at a basic level, but the maze data/state handling is incomplete and buggy (row count mismatch, dots not reset between games/levels, death/level-complete states never resolve), so this falls well short of a solid Pac-Man implementation.
